name: Halves Sum Mode
description: Halves with sum dendrite integration instead of min_vs_max, plus pow-3 sharpening. Tests alternative dendrite combination. Sum tends toward saturation — compare stability.

config.description: Uses process_mode 'sum' (all dendrites summed and clamped) instead of min_vs_max (best excitatory vs best inhibitory). Sum mode gives wider tension range but risks saturation. Compare daemon stability.
